Control Systems Engineering
Precision automation solutions for industrial processes
We design, build, and commission sophisticated control systems that power modern industrial operations with reliability, precision, and seamless integration.
Industrial Control Panel
Click to view full size
What is a Control System?
A sophisticated integration of hardware and software designed to monitor, regulate, and optimize industrial machines and processes with precision and reliability.

Our control panels are built to the highest industry standards, featuring premium components and meticulous attention to detail. Every installation undergoes rigorous testing to ensure optimal performance and longevity.
State-of-the-art control panel with organized wiring and industrial-grade components
Every component is carefully selected and professionally installed for maximum reliability
All our control panels are built to IEC and NEMA standards, with full documentation, CAD drawings, and comprehensive warranty coverage.
Our control systems power operations across diverse sectors, delivering reliability and efficiency where it matters most.
Technical Specifications
Engineered for precision, reliability, and performance in industrial environments
Collect, transform, and load data seamlessly from multiple sources to build a unified and reliable data foundation.
Leverage BI tools like Power BI and Tableau to visualize KPIs, generate dashboards, and uncover actionable insights.
Create impactful visuals, videos, and animations that make complex data easy to understand and more engaging.
Use AI and automation to deliver better content, streamline workflows, and personalize customer interactions.
Powering the shift to clean mobility with cutting‑edge automation and test systems.
The global automotive industry is embracing{" "} electrification as the future of clean transport. Improved efficiency and sustainability are driving the mass adoption of{" "} Electric Vehicles.
Micrologic delivers assembly and test automation for EV components — including battery packs, BMS, motor controllers, vehicle control modules, chargers, and DC–DC converters.
All solutions are Industry 4.0‑ready, enhanced by our{" "} Traceware™ platform for traceability, resulting in a fully{" "} data‑driven manufacturing ecosystem.
Our Experience in Electric Vehicles
EV Applications & Solutions
Electrical & Electronics
Delivering automation excellence and traceability solutions for complex assemblies.
Miniaturisation and packed functionality have made modern{" "} Electronic Devices highly complex to assemble and test.

Micrologic has been providing automation solutions for assembly, inspection, testing, and packaging of electronic assemblies. Our assembly lines ensure part and process traceability to guarantee genealogy and{" "} test integrity.
All test parameters are securely stored against each device’s{" "} unique ID, ensuring accuracy and compliance.

Industrial RF Solutions RF Shielded Test Chambers Professional-grade electromagnetic shielding solutions engineered for precision testing, EMC compliance, and research applications.

RF shielded chambers provide controlled electromagnetic environments by blocking external interference and containing emissions. Essential for EMC/EMI testing, antenna measurements, wireless device certification, and sensitive R&D applications.

Testing Methodologies
Ensures correct component placement, solder joints, and electrical connections on the PCB before functional testing.
Validates the full functionality of the assembled board or product under simulated real-world operating conditions.
Programs or updates microcontrollers, flash, or programmable logic devices directly on the PCB during manufacturing.
Final quality check for the complete product, verifying performance, safety, and readiness before shipment.

Traceability & Digital Transformation

Complete Traceability Workflow
TRACEABILITY & DATA ANALYTICS
Traceware keeps a complete history of everything that the product undergoes in the assembly process and reports the precise details.
{pillar.title} {pillar.description}
Error Proofing & Process Traceability
Micrologic Philosophy: Building quality and a reliable history into every product produced in the assembly and test lines.
Making it impossible (or obvious) to mix up or skip a process. Preventing errors by design is the spirit of error proofing — often implemented using poka-yoke (mistake-proofing).
Micrologic Traceware creates a detailed birth certificate and life history for every electronic product. It records every step, component, and parameter.
Together, they form a robust system for high-quality electronic assembly
